data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of syncing back to the main booking system, which is explicitly listed in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or functioning as required. The absence of any checks or confirmations regarding the sync process indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of sync back to the main booking system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the sync back to the main booking system.
